SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-24-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THEIR CASE TODAY. INTERPRETER FOR SIGN LANGUAGE AND FOR DEAF INTERPRTER (ASL AND CDI) ORDERED FOR THE NEXT HEARING.
